name: Visit Video Logger
releaseNotes: Supersedes the intermediate v0.1.26 package and keeps the OIS/EIS stabilization fix aligned with the source commit and catalog hash. Rear stabilization controls request one clear mode at a time, rear video resolution changes reapply the selected Camera2 request, and logcat records the selected 540p/720p/1080p rear resolution, preview size, OIS mode, preferred EIS mode, and requested EIS mode for verification.
description: Visit Video Logger records driving or travel videos with a composed camera, map, GPS, heading, speed, timestamp, and optional front-camera picture-in-picture overlay. It includes stationary GPS/compass smoothing, camera-aspect-safe recording composition, rear driving camera controls, a black-screen recording mode, and readable location/story panels for travel narration.
